aboutSection.title: About Festival
aboutSection.description: The National Highland Festival is Azerbaijan's largest and most interesting national festival. This festival is held to preserve our national culture, customs and traditions, and history.

ozYurdunuQurSection.title: Build Your Camp
ozYurdunuQurSection.description: Get the opportunity to participate in the festival by bringing your own tent and staying overnight. Connect with nature and create unforgettable memories.

volunteerSection.title: Become a Volunteer
volunteerSection.description: Participate as a volunteer for the successful organization of the festival and become a member of a big family.

about.title: About Festival
about.content: The National Highland Festival is Azerbaijan's largest and most interesting national festival. This festival is held to preserve our national culture, customs and traditions, and history. During the festival, a rich cultural program, concerts, exhibitions and various activities are organized.

sponsorship.title: Sponsorship
sponsorship.content: If you want to become a sponsor of the National Highland Festival, please contact us.
sponsorship.contactNumber: Contact number: +994 XX XXX XX XX
